message:
Fix remaining E2E test for search JSON response format (edge cases)

Follow-up to previous commit: update the special characters edge case
test in the "Invalid Input and Edge Case Handling" test suite to use
the new search response format.

This test validates that special characters in search queries are
handled safely without crashing. The assertion logic remains the same
(expect 0 or more results), but now correctly accesses the results
through the response wrapper object.

Location: CLI E2E: Invalid Input and Edge Case Handling
  → "should handle special characters in search query safely"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
